part_number_status: Lists all unique part numbers found in the workflow for your search. Whitelisted entries (parts that already passed FAI) are grouped separately from those still requiring a First Article Inspection.
inspection_checklist: Splits the searched part number into its dash-separated segments and checks each one against the vendor's whitelisted base part numbers. A green ✓ chip means that segment was previously approved via FAI. A grey — chip means FAI is required. Expand a green chip to see the matching whitelist entries.
raw_records: Shows every raw workflow row that matched your search, with all original columns from the Excel file for full traceability.
